prompt: Genera la Matriz de Alcance y Secuencia para Lengua y Literatura 5to EGB con 6 destrezas de ejemplo.
expected_output: JSON matrix with 6 destrezas mapped to units, each with DZ-LENG-5-XXX codes, indicadores, Bloom and Marzano levels, and evidence tags. Coverage report showing 6/6 destrezas mapped, 0 orphaned.
expectations: Output contains valid JSON with 'matriz_as' root key
Every destreza has a DZ code matching pattern DZ-LENG-5-\d{3}
Every destreza has at least one indicador de logro
Bloom level is one of: Recordar, Comprender, Aplicar, Analizar, Evaluar, Crear
Marzano level is one of: Recuperacion, Comprension, Analisis, Utilizacion, Metacognicion, Sistema del Yo
At least one insercion curricular per unit

prompt: Genera una matriz para Matematica 6to EGB. Incluye 10 destrezas y verifica la cobertura completa.
expected_output: JSON matrix with exactly 10 destrezas distributed across units with 100% coverage. Units should show cognitive progression from lower to higher Bloom levels.
expectations: Earlier units contain lower Bloom levels (Recordar, Comprender)
Later units contain higher Bloom levels (Analizar, Evaluar, Crear)
All DZ codes use MAT asignatura code and 6 for year
Evidence tags present on every entry

prompt: Genera la Matriz A&S sin especificar la asignatura.
expected_output: Error message requesting the asignatura and grado, explaining they are required inputs. Should not generate a partial or guessed matrix.
expectations: Response asks user for asignatura code
Lists valid asignatura codes (LENG, MAT, CCNN, etc.)
Does not fabricate or assume a default asignatura
